promo.title: One platform for every store
promo.description: See how Vellora replaces five tools with one workspace.

Hero.title: Run your workforce, not your spreadsheets
Hero.subtitle: Vellora unifies scheduling, attendance, leave, and hiring in one place — so operations and HR leaders can run every store and shift from a single, modern platform.
Hero.trust: Free 14-day trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

Highlights.title: The essentials your stores run on
Highlights.subtitle: Replace the patchwork of spreadsheets, group chats, and paper sign-in sheets with one platform built for multi-location teams.

items.title: Smart scheduling
items.description: Build rosters across every store in minutes with templates, coverage rules, and one-click shift transfers.

items.title: QR attendance
items.description: Staff clock in and out from a store QR code. Timesheets build themselves — accurate, tamper-resistant, real-time.

items.title: Effortless compliance
items.description: Leave policies, approvals, and audit trails stay consistent across locations and countries, automatically.

items.title: Plan every shift, across every location
items.description: Drag-and-drop rosters, reusable templates, and demand-aware coverage keep each store staffed without the back-and-forth.

items.title: QR clock-in that builds timesheets for you
items.description: Employees scan a store QR to clock in and out. Hours, breaks, and overtime are captured accurately and ready for payroll.

items.title: Time-off that runs itself
items.description: Configurable policies, balances, and approval chains mean requests route to the right manager and never get lost.

items.title: Hire for your stores, faster
items.description: Post jobs, screen candidates, and schedule interviews from one pipeline — with a public careers site built in.

HowItWorks.title: Up and running in three steps

steps.title: Set up stores & team
steps.description: Add your locations, operating hours, and people. Invite managers and staff in minutes.

steps.title: Schedule & track
steps.description: Publish shifts, let staff clock in by QR, and manage leave — all kept in sync across stores.

steps.title: Get insights
steps.description: See hours, attendance, and labor cost at a glance, then act before small issues become big ones.

Pricing.title: Plans that scale with your stores
Pricing.subtitle: Start free, then pick the plan that fits. Prices shown are placeholders for this preview.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Up to 25 employees · up to 3 stores

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Up to 100 employees · up to 10 stores

Testimonials.title: Built for the people who run the floor

items.quote: Scheduling five locations used to eat my Mondays. Now the rosters publish themselves and my managers actually trust the numbers.
items.name: A. Rivera

items.quote: QR clock-in ended the timesheet guesswork. Payroll prep that took a day now takes an hour.
items.name: J. Chen

items.quote: Onboarding new stores is finally repeatable. Everything our teams need lives in one place.
items.name: M. Okafor

items.question: How is our data kept secure and isolated from other companies?
items.answer: Every company is a separate tenant. Data is isolated at the database level with row-level security plus query scoping, so one company can never see another's records. Sensitive documents are stored privately and access is role-based.

items.question: Does Vellora work for teams across multiple countries?
items.answer: Yes. Vellora is multi-country ready from day one — times are stored in UTC and shown in each user's local timezone, and you can configure per-store operating hours and public-holiday calendars.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: Plans scale with your number of employees and stores, billed monthly or annually. You can start on a free trial with no credit card, then upgrade as you grow. The prices shown here are placeholders for this preview.

items.question: Can we migrate from spreadsheets or another HR tool?
items.answer: Yes. You can import employees and stores to get started quickly, and our team can help map your existing data so you're up and running without re-entering everything by hand.

items.question: What support do you offer?
items.answer: All plans include email support and documentation. Business plans add priority support, and Enterprise includes a dedicated contact with an SLA.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Most teams add their stores, invite their people, and publish a first schedule the same day. There's nothing to install — Vellora runs in the browser.

FinalCta.title: Ready to streamline your workforce?
FinalCta.subtitle: Bring scheduling, attendance, leave, and hiring together — and give every store the same modern playbook.
